initial_draft:
Okay, I'm Player BLUE. Let's analyze this situation. Player RED has 100 dollars, and I have 0. They're proposing to give me 10 dollars. Since I have nothing to offer, this is a reasonable starting point. Accepting this trade seems like the best option to avoid losing everything.

```
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE> 
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering a trade. I have nothing to offer, so accepting seems like the best option to avoid a rejection and loss of resources for both players.</reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> I accept the trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> Player RED Gives Dollars: 10 | Player BLUE Gives Dollars: 0 </newly proposed trade>
```
